I won't touch anything else. Sound good?

content:
type: DONE
my_files: outlines/prompts.py
note: Implemented register_filter()/unregister_filter() with a module-level _FILTERS registry, and hooked env.filters.update(_FILTERS) into both _template_from_str and _template_from_file so registered filters are automatically available in every template. Verified: existing 13/13 tests in tests/test_prompts.py still pass, plus manual check that a registered filter works and unregistering it causes a fresh template compile to correctly raise TemplateAssertionError. Note: in my sandbox copy of the repo, your create_jinja_env/local-filters changes weren't present (looks like we're in separate sandboxes, not a shared filesystem), so I didn't end up needing to layer on top of it - my registry merge is self-contained and independent of the local filters param. All good on my end.
